Url: https://github.com/Mojang/minecraft.api.client.sdk
Commit: 80bb3d306de3b6881a320f41f8452bac16996c8d
Branch: feature/trials-theme
Contact: Robert Sjödahl (robert@mojang.com)
Note: To update, copy over the "core", "jwt," and "modules" folders into the "include" folder of this module. Files outside of those folders doesn't need to be copied over. 
IMPORTANT! Make sure that you restore any ANTICHEAT_ macros that might have been removed by updating the files.

Please update this file if you drop in a new version of the library!!!
